title: viburnum chingii var. limitaneum
intro: Viburnum chingii var. limitaneum, also known as the Tibetan viburnum, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of the Tibetan Plateau. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viburnum chingii var. limitaneum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
